_readme: Arch Linux ZFS Installer config. Edit the ACTIVE CONFIG section below, then run ./03-install.sh

_MODE_HELP.single: One disk — auto-partitioned: ESP + rpool (OS) + dpool (storage). Set 'disk' to the target device.
_MODE_HELP.multi: Multiple disks — OS pool (rpool) + storage groups (dpool). Set 'os_pool' and 'storage_groups'.
_MODE_HELP.auto: Omit 'mode' to auto-detect: 'disk' key present → single, 'os_pool.disks' with entries → multi.

options._kernel: Which kernel to install. 'lts' = linux-lts (recommended — stable, always supported by archzfs). 'default' = linux (latest rolling kernel, may not yet be supported by archzfs).
options._bootloader: Which bootloader to install. 'systemd-boot' = lightweight EFI-only loader (default, recommended). 'grub' = GRUB with full ZFS support via grub-btrfs-like config.
options._encryption: ZFS native AES-256-GCM on all pools. You will be prompted for a passphrase during install.
options._swap_size: 'auto' = RAM×2 (recommended for hibernation support). Or fixed: '8G', '16G', '32G'.
options._esp_size: EFI System Partition size per disk. 512M is plenty for both systemd-boot and GRUB.

packages._help: All packages are installed via pacstrap alongside the base system. Use exact pacman package names.
packages._extra: Flat list of any additional packages. Example: ['htop', 'neofetch', 'firefox', 'vlc']

groups._gui: GUI apps — useful when combined with post_install.kde=true. Example: ['firefox', 'vlc', 'gimp']

post_install._help: Each script in extras/ runs inside chroot at the end of installation when set to true.
post_install._kde: extras/kde.sh — KDE Plasma 6 + SDDM + PipeWire audio + Bluetooth + printing.
post_install._security: extras/security.sh — UFW firewall (deny-by-default) + ClamAV (weekly scan + daily defs update).

_SINGLE_DISK_EXAMPLE._info: Laptop or single-disk desktop. The disk is split automatically.
_SINGLE_DISK_EXAMPLE._ashift: 12 = 4K sectors (SATA SSD/HDD). 13 = 8K sectors (NVMe, optional but common).
_SINGLE_DISK_EXAMPLE._os_size: 'auto' = max(20% of disk, RAM×2+30GiB, 40GiB). Or fixed: '80G', '120G'.

_MULTI_MIRROR_EXAMPLE._info: 2 NVMes mirrored for OS. 3 SSDs as raidz1 storage.

os_pool._topology: mirror | stripe | none | (omit to be prompted at runtime)

storage_groups.name: ssd
storage_groups._topology: mirror | stripe | raidz1 | raidz2 | independent | (omit to be prompted)

_MULTI_NO_RAID_EXAMPLE._info: 2 NVMes listed; topology=none means you pick one for OS at runtime, the other joins dpool.

_MULTI_PROMPTED_EXAMPLE._info: Omit 'topology' in os_pool and/or storage_groups to be prompted at runtime with suggestions.
